# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Always use curly braces for all conditional statements (if, else, else if) and loop bodies (for, foreach, while), even when there is only one statement in the body.

## Project Structure
- Always separate DTOs, records, and data models into individual files within a Models folder, following a strict one-type-per-file convention. Do not group multiple records/DTOs in the same file. The file name should match the type name.
